reasoning: Reviewed the full order details and the Comments History section. Internal staff note dated Jan 14, 2026 flags a FRAUD ALERT: the customer has 13 refunds in the last 60 days with an 87% refund rate, all claiming issues despite confirmed delivery, totaling $2411.66 refunded. The note explicitly instructs not to process and to escalate to Loss Prevention. Based on this documented internal guidance and risk indicators, the refund request for order #000000626 must be escalated rather than approved or denied at this level.
